A manifold is a topological space that near each point resembles Euclidean space

Knot theory is the study of mathematical knots
a knot is an embedding of a circle in three-dimensional Euclidean space
Two mathematical knots are equivalent if one can be transformed into the other via a deformation
A simplicial complex is a topological space of a certain kind
A CW complex is a type of topological space introduced by J. H. C. Whitehead
